channel.title: Llmops on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Llmops on Junho Lee

item.title: Scaling Organizational Intelligence Beyond AI Licenses
item.description: AI adoption often stalls when individual productivity gains fail to become team assets. Success requires moving from usage metrics to collective learning loops.

item.title: Hermes WebUI: Browser-Based Control for Autonomous Agents
item.description: Hermes WebUI moves autonomous agent management from the terminal to the browser – multi-profile context isolation, file browsing, and long-term memory in one interface.
